notes: MVP governance registry. It classifies entry modes and keeps all non-live tiny paths blocked until NOT_ATH quote-clean shadow evidence justifies isolated paper work.

live.description: Paper-live modes currently allowed to open entries.

isolated_paper_capped.description: Candidate modes that may deserve capped paper later, but remain blocked until cap/loss/cooldown isolation is implemented.

shadow_watch_only.description: Raw and quote-clean signal validation only; no pending entry or paper fill.

hard_shadow.description: Paper EV is already poor enough that more live paper would mostly repeat known loss.

deprecated_shadow.description: No executable signal for the review window; candidate for deletion after review.

not_ath_watch_before_registry_expansion.if_fail: Do not invest in broader isolated paper governance; archive tiny probe/reclaim work and return to primary selector work.
not_ath_watch_before_registry_expansion.if_pass: Implement isolated paper caps and focused snapshot collection for the highest-priority capped modes.

lotto_fast_lane.reason: Primary LOTTO entry path after timing passes.

lotto_fast_arm.reason: Primary LOTTO armed state before timing passes.

smart_entry_pullback_bounce.reason: Main pullback entry path; still governed by mode EV.

lotto_concentrated_scout.reason: Small live scout path; explicitly registered so it cannot bypass governance.

explosive_newborn_direct_scout.reason: Small live newborn path; explicitly registered so it cannot bypass governance.

source_resonance_tiny_probe.reason: Tiny paper-only probe for Telegram + GMGN pre-seen resonance; explicitly registered for attribution.

ath_micro_reclaim_tiny_probe.reason: Observed quote-clean paper EV is strongly negative.

ath_no_kline_tiny_probe.reason: Observed paper win rate and robust EV are poor.

lotto_micro_reclaim_tiny_probe.reason: Largest negative tiny reclaim sample; keep stopped.

momentum_direct_entry.reason: Proving-cap path is negative and should not bypass tiny governance.

matrix_reclaim_tiny_probe.reason: Known noisy giveback path; keep hard-shadowed until redesigned.

lotto_high_risk_discovery_probe.reason: High-risk fallback probe; stopped until isolated paper caps exist.

lotto_not_ath_reclaim_tiny_probe.reason: Old paper path is hindsight-contaminated; use lotto_not_ath_watch_shadow first.

lotto_upstream_miss_tiny_scout.reason: Finder/backtest only; no live paper arm.

lotto_upstream_realtime_tiny_scout.reason: Needs quote-clean shadow evidence before any paper restore.

ath_flat_structure_tiny_scout.reason: ATH real-probe wrapper mode; keep blocked until cap enforcement exists.

ath_high_mc_tiny_probe.reason: Grey-zone ATH tiny mode; requires isolated caps before more paper.

ath_matrix_dissonance_tiny_probe.reason: Grey-zone ATH tiny mode; requires isolated caps before more paper.

ath_reclaim_after_failure_tiny_probe.reason: Grey-zone ATH tiny mode; requires isolated caps before more paper.

ath_soft_reclaim_tiny_scout.reason: Grey-zone ATH tiny scout; requires isolated caps before more paper.

ath_uncertainty_tiny_scout.reason: Grey-zone ATH tiny scout; requires isolated caps before more paper.

gmgn_concentration_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample GMGN path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

gmgn_low_kline_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample GMGN path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

gmgn_midcap_near_miss_scout.reason: Low sample GMGN path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

gmgn_reclaim_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample GMGN path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

gmgn_unknown_data_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample GMGN path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

lotto_low_liquidity_reclaim_tiny_probe.reason: Near flat but under-sampled; do not restore until isolated caps exist.

matrix_micro_momentum_tiny_probe.reason: Grey-zone matrix tiny mode; requires isolated caps before more paper.

newborn_momentum_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample newborn path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

pullback_tiny_scout.reason: Too little paper data; requires isolated caps before more paper.

smart_entry_reclaim_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample reclaim path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

unknown_data_activity_tiny_scout.reason: Low sample unknown-data path; collect shadow evidence before capped paper.

ath_real_probe.reason: Live probe wrapper maps to ath_flat_structure_tiny_scout and is blocked by that registry entry.

lotto_not_ath_watch_shadow.reason: Independent NOT_ATH watch layer with quote-clean double-snapshot confirmation.
